Number_of_defective.description: Number of defective items per observation (d), used as the discrete values at which F_n(x) and F_0(x) are evaluated.

Observed_frequency.description: Observed frequency (f_i) for each defective count category. Cumulated and divided by N=33 to compute the empirical CDF F_n(x).

N.description: Total sample size (N=33), used as the denominator when computing the empirical cumulative distribution F_n(x).

lambda.description: Estimated Poisson parameter λ=1.7, used to compute the theoretical Poisson probabilities P(d) and hence the theoretical CDF F_0(x).
